rendering: Rebuilt on the skill bootstrap-shell design system (sidebar layout, Inter/JetBrains fonts, .doc-* components, styled Mermaid, tabbed API contracts).
assumptions: ASSUMPTION: API Gateway is the normal caller for user-authenticated traffic; service-local auth is unspecified in these docs.
ASSUMPTION: Business-flow boundaries are derived from the three current REST operations and the RabbitMQ price-update consumer.
ASSUMPTION: UC-CANCEL remains documented as a business requirement, but current source evidence is unspecified.
unresolved_unspecified_items: PortfolioService currently constructs response objects; repository-backed persistence behavior is partial.
Order lifecycle state, cancellation endpoint, matching rules, and settlement behavior are unspecified.
PnL calculation method and market-price integration are unspecified; current implementation returns a fixed value.
RabbitMQ retry, dead-letter handling, payload schema, and acknowledgement policy are unspecified.
Production migration/versioning strategy is unspecified; schema evidence comes from init.sql and JPA mappings.
Service-level authentication/authorization contract is unspecified beyond source-level security evidence.
document_check_notes: scripts/check_documents.py reports errors=0 warnings=0 against docs/portfolio-service.
documentation_notes: Anchors: every artifact page carries id=<STABLE-ID> on its hero so cross-page #ID links resolve.
Search index inline JSON uses id=projectDocSearchIndex and matches _meta/search-index.json exactly.
Business-flow and API flow pages load the Mermaid CDN script with an initializer.
